channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Easton’s Birthday Paw-ty & Campus Cupboard Reveal
item.description: Date: Friday, July 10, 2026 11:30 AM - 1:00 PM - Happy 13th Birthday Easton! Join Presidential Pup Easton to celebrate his 13th Birthday. Stop by to pet or just say Happy Birthday and enjoy ice pops! Our event is taking place in the new home of the Campus Cupboard, formerly the student pantry. Please join us in viewing the new and improved location. During the Celebration: Tour the newly renovated Campus Cupboard, learn about this important Student Support Program, discover ways to donate…
item.author: Community

item.title: Gone Phishing: Report the Phish, Reel in the Rewards!
item.description: For the month of August, our Information Security team is having a contest for the Top 3 Students, Faculty, or Staff that report Phishing and Spam emails to our AI Security Analyst: PhishStick. Top three reporters will win prizes including RPI Merchandise and custom vinyl stickers from our Information Security team!
item.author: Community

item.title: JEC/DCC Walkway Project – Concrete Pour Scheduled July 8
item.description: A concrete pour for the JEC/DCC Walkway Project is scheduled for the morning of Wednesday, July 8. A concrete truck will be staged near the Playhouse and CII, and concrete will be transported by cart through the Low/CII Plaza to the work site. The area will be an active construction zone during this activity. Normal pedestrian access and traffic patterns will resume once the concrete pour is complete. Thank you for your cooperation.
item.author: Community

item.title: Fidelity Confidential Consultation (In Person)
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 8, 2026 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM - Schedule a confidential consultation to help you become better informed and more confident about your workplace retirement savings plan benefits. To schedule an appointment, call 1-800-642-7131, Monday through Friday, 8:00 am to midnight, or online at https://nb.fidelity.com/public/nbpreloginnav/rpi/microsite/#/tem/meet-with-us
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Volunteer for New Student Orientation and NRB!
item.description:
FYE is looking for enthusiastic volunteers to help welcome our new students and their families to campus. This is a great way to connect with colleagues, spread some school spirit, and be part of an unforgettable kickoff to the year. Sign up to volunteer here: https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0445A8A92FA6F5C34-64354400-fall Questions? Email fye@rpi.edu.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
